Recommend a mapping API to create an interactive map showcasing locations like "Viña Polkura," "Vivero las Vertientes," and "IIVO" as featured on the Turismo Marchigüe website.
Write a PHP script to send an email inquiry to "turismo@marchigue.cl" using the contact information provided on the Turismo Marchigüe website.
Develop a Python program that organizes tourism data into categories such as "Historia," "Artesanías," "Fiestas," and "Emprendimientos," based on the structure of the Turismo Marchigüe website.
